questions.text: The soldier ran across the road and saved the child. The word “across” is a -----.

options.explanation: Across" can function as different parts of speech depending on its use in a sentence:Preposition: When it shows location or direction. questions.subject: English

options.explanation: Good riddance" is an idiomatic expression used to express relief or satisfaction

Good riddance" is an idiomatic expression used to express relief or satisfaction at the departure or removal of someone or something unwanted or troublesome. It's often used when saying goodbye to something or someone that has been a burden or a nuisance. For example, "He finally moved out, and I say good riddance!"
